name: /advancement
description: Gives, removes, or checks player advancements and their criteria.

name: /attribute
description: Queries, adds, removes, or sets an entity attribute or its modifiers.

name: /ban
description: Adds a player to the server banlist, preventing them from connecting. Multiplayer only.

name: /ban-ip
description: Adds an IP address to the server banlist. Multiplayer only.

name: /banlist
description: Displays the server's ban list of players or IP addresses. Multiplayer only.

name: /bossbar
description: Creates and modifies boss bars displayed at the top of the screen.

name: /clear
description: Clears items from a player's inventory, optionally filtering by item type and count.

name: /clone
description: Copies blocks from one region to another, with options for filtering and placement mode.

name: /damage
description: Applies a specified amount and type of damage to the target entities.

name: /data
description: Gets, merges, modifies, and removes NBT data of block entities, entities, or command storage.

name: /datapack
description: Controls the loading and ordering of data packs.

name: /debug
description: Starts or stops a debugging session, recording tick timing and profiling data.

name: /defaultgamemode
description: Sets the default game mode for new players joining the world.

name: /deop
description: Revokes operator status from a player on the server. Multiplayer only.

name: /difficulty
description: Sets or queries the current difficulty level of the world.

name: /effect
description: Gives or removes status effects (potion effects) on players or entities.

name: /enchant
description: Adds an enchantment to the selected item held by the target player.

name: /execute
description: Executes a command with modified context such as changed executor, position, dimension, or conditional checks.

name: /experience
description: Adds, sets, or queries player experience points or levels.

name: /fill
description: Fills a region between two positions with a specified block, with optional fill modes.

name: /fillbiome
description: Fills a region between two positions with a specified biome.

name: /forceload
description: Forces specified chunks to remain constantly loaded or removes forced loading.

name: /function
description: Runs a data pack function or all functions tagged with a specified function tag.

name: /gamemode
description: Sets the game mode of a player (survival, creative, adventure, or spectator).

name: /gamerule
description: Sets or queries a game rule value that controls various world behaviors.

name: /give
description: Gives a specified item to one or more players, with an optional count.

name: /help
description: Provides help and usage information for commands. Available to all players.

name: /item
description: Manipulates or replaces items in the inventory slots of blocks or entities.

name: /jfr
description: Starts or stops a Java Flight Recorder profiling session for performance analysis.

name: /kick
description: Forcibly disconnects a player from the server with an optional reason message.

name: /kill
description: Kills entities including players, mobs, and items. Defaults to the command executor.

name: /list
description: Lists all players currently connected to the server, optionally showing their UUIDs.

name: /locate
description: Locates the closest structure, biome, or point of interest and displays its coordinates.

name: /loot
description: Generates and distributes items from loot tables to players, containers, or the world.

name: /me
description: Displays an action message about the sender in chat (e.g., '* Player waves').

name: /msg
description: Sends a private message to one or more players that only they can see. Aliases: /tell, /w.

name: /op
description: Grants operator status to a player on the server. Multiplayer only.

name: /pardon
description: Removes a player from the server banlist, allowing them to connect again. Multiplayer only.

name: /pardon-ip
description: Removes an IP address from the server banlist. Multiplayer only.

name: /particle
description: Creates particle effects at a specified location with configurable spread, speed, and count.

name: /perf
description: Captures game performance metrics and tick timing data for 10 seconds. Multiplayer only.

name: /place
description: Places a configured feature, structure, jigsaw, or structure template at a position.

name: /playsound
description: Plays a specified sound effect to one or more players at a location.

name: /publish
description: Opens a singleplayer world to the local network for other players to join. Singleplayer only.

name: /random
description: Draws a random integer from a range, or resets/controls a named random number sequence.

name: /recipe
description: Gives or takes (unlocks or locks) crafting recipes for the specified players.

name: /reload
description: Reloads all data packs including loot tables, advancements, recipes, tags, and functions from disk.

name: /return
description: Controls execution flow inside functions by setting the return value and halting the function.

name: /ride
description: Makes an entity mount another entity as a passenger, or dismounts it from its current vehicle.

name: /rotate
description: Changes the rotation of an entity to face a direction, position, or another entity.

name: /save-all
description: Saves the server world data to disk. Use 'flush' to force immediate write. Multiplayer only.

name: /save-off
description: Disables automatic saving of world data. Use before backups. Multiplayer only.

name: /save-on
description: Re-enables automatic saving of world data after it has been disabled. Multiplayer only.

name: /say
description: Broadcasts a message to all players in the chat, shown as '[Player] message'.

name: /schedule
description: Schedules a function to run after a specified delay in ticks, seconds, or days.

name: /scoreboard
description: Manages scoreboard objectives, player scores, display slots, and team-based tracking.

name: /seed
description: Displays the world seed value used for terrain generation.

name: /setblock
description: Places or replaces a block at a specified position with optional handling mode.

name: /setidletimeout
description: Sets the time in minutes before idle players are automatically kicked. Multiplayer only.

name: /setworldspawn
description: Sets the world's default spawn point and optional spawn angle for new or respawning players.

name: /spawnpoint
description: Sets the individual spawn point for specified players, overriding the world spawn.

name: /spectate
description: Makes a player in spectator mode spectate (follow the camera of) a specified entity.

name: /spreadplayers
description: Teleports entities to random surface locations spread out within a specified area.

name: /stop
description: Gracefully shuts down the server, saving all data before stopping. Multiplayer only.

name: /stopsound
description: Stops currently playing sounds for the specified players, optionally filtering by source or sound.

name: /summon
description: Spawns an entity at a specified location with optional NBT data for customization.

name: /tag
description: Manages custom tags on entities used for identification and targeting in commands.

name: /team
description: Creates, modifies, and manages teams for controlling PvP, name colors, and collision.

name: /teammsg
description: Sends a message only to members of the sender's team. Alias: /tm.

name: /teleport
description: Teleports entities to a specified location, entity, or coordinates with optional facing direction. Alias: /tp.

name: /tell
description: Sends a private message to one or more players. Alias for /msg and /w.

name: /tellraw
description: Displays a rich text component message to specified players with formatting, colors, and click events.

name: /test
description: Creates, runs, and manages GameTest framework tests for verifying game behavior.

name: /tick
description: Controls the game's tick rate for debugging, including freezing, stepping, and changing tick speed.

name: /time
description: Sets, adds to, or queries the world's current game time, day count, or day/night cycle.

name: /title
description: Manages large screen titles, subtitles, and action bar text displayed to players.

name: /tm
description: Shorthand alias for /teammsg. Sends a message only to members of the sender's team.

name: /tp
description: Shorthand alias for /teleport. Teleports entities to a location or another entity.

name: /transfer
description: Triggers a transfer of players to another server by hostname and port. Dedicated server only.

name: /trigger
description: Sets or increments a trigger-type scoreboard objective. Available to all players without op.

name: /w
description: Shorthand alias for /msg. Sends a private whisper message to specified players.

name: /weather
description: Sets the weather to clear, rain, or thunder for an optional duration in seconds.

name: /whitelist
description: Manages the server whitelist, controlling which players can connect. Multiplayer only.

name: /worldborder
description: Manages the world border size, center, damage, warning distance, and shrink/expand timing.

name: /xp
description: Shorthand alias for /experience. Adds, sets, or queries player experience points or levels.
